_genre: genre (e.g. platformer, rpg, fps, sandbox, racing)
_notes: Template keymap — copy this file and rename to <game>.json. Map Xbox controller buttons to keyboard key names. Left stick is always WASD (handled by the injector). Right stick is always mouse movement. Underscore-prefixed fields are metadata, ignored by the loader.
_buttons: SOUTH (A), EAST (B), WEST (X), NORTH (Y), DPAD_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT, LEFT/RIGHT_SHOULDER (LB/RB), LEFT/RIGHT_TRIGGER (LT/RT), START, BACK, LEFT/RIGHT_THUMB (L3/R3)
_keys: space, escape, return, tab, shift, control, option, command, up, down, left, right, a-z, 0-9
